title: Auth module, RBAC, audit logging, master data CRUD with bulk import/export
key_decisions: JWT access token TTL: 15 minutes; refresh token TTL: 8 hours; stored in Redis under campusops:refresh:<jti>
Bcrypt salt rounds: 12 — balances security and startup speed; configurable via config.auth.bcryptRounds

RBAC: 5 fixed roles (Administrator, Operations Manager, Classroom Supervisor, Customer Service Agent, Auditor); checked in requirePermission() middleware using a permissions matrix in src/lib/permissions.ts
AuditLog entries encrypted at rest (AES-256-GCM); metadata stored as JSON blob; actor ID always recorded
Refresh token revocation: Redis key deletion on logout/revoke; jti checked on every refresh call
Master data import: CSV upload (multer/memory), Zod validation, idempotent upsert per record, per-row error accumulation (does not abort on first failure)
Export: JSON array download (Accept: application/json) or CSV (Accept: text/csv); no pagination — full table
IntegrationKey: HMAC-SHA256 signing key for hardware endpoints; created/rotated by Administrators; stored as bcrypt hash in DB
Settings: key-value store in SystemSetting table; default values seeded; type coercion (boolean/number/string) per known key
User management: Admin can create/update/deactivate users; no self-deactivation; passwords hashed on creation
files_updated: backend/src/routes/index.ts (authRoutes, auditRoutes, userRoutes, settingsRoutes, departmentRoutes, semesterRoutes, courseRoutes, classRoutes, studentRoutes registered)
backend/src/middleware/auth.middleware.ts (authenticate + requirePermission; requirePermission wraps permissions.ts matrix)
next_prompt: Prompt 4 — Parking module, membership tiers, coupons, stored value, logistics, fulfillment requests
